title: (Full - Time) MID-NIGHT SHIFT DELIVERY DRIVER (upto $2K + incentives) #SGUnitedJobs
description:
🚚 Night Shift Driver – Earn Up to $2,400 + Incentives!


Join our team as a Night Shift Driver and be part of a dynamic operation keeping Singapore’s sandwich vending machines stocked and running smoothly!


Enjoy flexible night hours, a company-provided vehicle, and incentives that reward your dedication.


What You’ll Do:

  • Collect freshly made sandwiches from Admiralty Bakery
  • Deliver and stock vending machines across Singapore
  • Ensure vending machines are functioning properly
  • Assist with any other ad hoc tasks

What We’re Looking For:

  • Valid Class 3 Manual driving license with at least 1 year of driving experience
  • Minimum 1 year of relevant work experience (entry-level applicants in general work/driver roles welcome)
  • Reliable, responsible, and ready to work midnight shifts
  • Minimum education: Primary/Secondary School/"O" Level, Higher Secondary/Pre-U/A Level, or equivalent

What We Offer:

Salary: $2,400 + incentives (earn up to $2,500)

Benefits: Company mobile phone provided. Petrol card, ERP card, and season parking fully covered. Annual Salary Increment and Bonus Payout.


Additional Info:

Working hours are from 11:00pm to approximately 9:00am, Monday to Friday, and from 2:00am to around 9:00am on Saturdays.

Company-provided GPS-equipped vehicle (no personal use).

Employees may drive the vehicle home after their shift.

The machine-based incentive is awarded after independently servicing vending machines (VM). Starting from the 25th machine and for each additional machine thereafter, an extra $100 incentive is provided per machine per month.

The performance-based incentives are as follows:

  • Machine Cleanliness and Maintenance: $100 per month
  • Minimizing Sandwich Throwaways: $50 per month
  • Minimizing Sandwich Sell-Outs: $50 per month

We are a truly equal-opportunity team: same pay, same routes, same respect—regardless of gender. Females welcome!


Contact HR at 64746491 or 96900136

postedCompany.description: A pioneer in food retailing catering to wide ranging locations. In 2003 became a first Asia when we introducted Singapore's very toasted sandwich vending machine. Since then, our network of vending machines has expanded across the island. We support a wide range of locations, from schools to hospitals, private companies to government institutions, to help them meet their catering needs.
postedCompany.name: HOTBAKE 24/7 PTE. LTD.
